Tests the `charAt` method of the `String` object to verify it returns the correct character.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `charAt` method on a `String` object in JavaScript. It checks that calling `charAt(0)` on the string `"abc"` returns the character `"a"`. This test ensures that the `charAt` method correctly retrieves the character at the specified index, which is a fundamental operation for string manipulation. The code is narrow in functionality, focusing solely on validating this specific behavior of the `String` object.
